markdown:
# Cloak of Arachnida

This fine garment is made of black silk interwoven with faint, silvery threads. While wearing it, you gain the following benefits.

## Poison Resistance

You have [[resistance]] to Poison damage.

## Spider Climb

You have a [[climb_speed Speed]] equal to your [[speed]] and can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and along ceilings, while leaving your hands free.

## Spider Walk

You can't be caught in webs of any sort and can move through webs as if they were [[difficult_terrain Terrain]].

## Web

You can cast [[web]] (save DC 13). The web created by the spell fills twice its normal area. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.
